title: Don`t Look Now
review: It starts off slowly, but I started to enjoy it more towards the end. There's some great shots of venetian architecture, inside and out, and decent performances for a 1970s horror movie. Unfortunately the sound quality is very much of its time, and it's a lot of people talking in rooms about scary things that already happened, or things that they are worried might happen. It was funny to me how Donald Sutherland flipped that entire table.
